star_1.text: Great game, great music, visuals, but double tapping and then slide is stupid, weird and makes it unplayable. Uninstall...
Is it really a game? When I open the app it only shows a empty black screen. nothing else.

star_2.text: Fun game, but the top of the leader board is filled by people who have used a bug, which happens randomly, rarely, when hitting a ramp. Few reasons to play a game where the dev chooses for leader boards to have no value, which is a big part of the fun. I enjoy playing, but I won't continue to play this game, when competition doesn't exist.

star_3.text: EDIT: I spoke too soon. No matter how good a game is, I don't play games with forced ads Wow , now this is a game I can play for a long time to come . It looks great with a very cool retro soundtrack. It's very well done in all areas . This game is screaming out for the delorean and tron legacy light cycle 🤞🙏

Pretty good, but the physics of ramp jump and landing is a bit inappropriate, because it is almost impossible to control after 10000 score to maneuver in the air after a ramp jump, the landing is the problem.

Game play is good i like the concept but music is not smooth and relaxing as the game and when i making purchase error pop's up no internet connection even though am connected to my wifi. Please fix this issue it's fun game i want to upgrade my car

It's a cool game with some cool features. I like the daily leader board. But I don't like the look of the game. It's not intuitive and it's confusing. The GUI needs tweaking. The respawn animation is too slow.

It's a good game,decided to buy something to support dev. But tell me how $4.99 works out as charging me £4.69, $1.99 works out as charging me £1.99 and best of all $9.99 charges me £9.49? $9.99 is £8.24 so.... what's up?
Please show user name in daily leaderboard

star_4.text: Very solid game! But I think the nitro mechanic is kind of silly the way it is. Currently it's a limited resources you can only use a certain number of times but you also need to use them for certain tasks to level up. Additionally I find that double-tapping then sliding down is an uncomfortable control scheme. You should just slide down to start nitro right away if you need it.

Fun game. I think you should explain in the tutorial that double tap creates the shield while swiping down activates nitro. Like someone else said, the nitro shortcut is complicated and I died a few times because of it. Maybe swiping down while on the ground should activate both the shield and the nitro?

Literally tooo awesome game I'm not sponsorer I'm just giving my thoughts on this game its really beautiful But on the other hand it is also toooo basic and simple just swipe right left up down I think there must be more spice up things that may make this game more advanced and and adventurous By the game is literally beautiful ❤️😍 Thanks for making my day.

A better music library & Anti-aliasing is needed. An instructions menu as well touch to steer also would be appreciated. Swipe to steer makes this game feel like subway surfers / temple run. Also need a themed icon for homescreen.

Come on, bro, it's a fine game. But isn't it too greedy to show ads whenever you finish a game? Couldn't you just show those ads in the shop section to earn more coins or something like that? The ads just ruin the overall experience.
Fun. Fast. Satisfying. I would love to see better graphics and 120 fps support. By the way, the leaderboard doesn't show up for me.
Absolute Addiction - Would've given 5/5 stars only if the Google Play sync was better. It doesn't detect any achievements in Play Games.
so uh i keep getting this bug where all of the cars and the map wold glitch out and not look right can you guys fix this please?
Nice game But at certain point or some times it just hang stop. After reopen the game only able to play ...
I just downloaded this game after watching a post on LinkedIn And the gome looks soo aesthetic and sold Expecting some more features too
Really its tge best offline game🙂
It was best experience of Play ▶️

star_5.text: Superdash is a game that delivers an electrifying experience from start to finish. With its stunning visuals, smooth controls, and heart-pounding soundtrack, it's a must-play for any gamer. The neon-soaked, cyberpunk world of Superdash is a visual delight, and the gameplay is both accessible and challenging. Navigating through a series of unique levels, you'll encounter a variety of obstacles and puzzles that keep you engaged and excited.

Has potential. Loved the visuals and vehicles and it's not hard either. I also like the simple menu and UI. Very beautiful looking game. Played such a good game after a very long time. P.s. I would like to request the developers to provide an option to play in different worlds coz everytime when the game starts in the same blue world it gets boring and repetitive

I'm not a really a mobile gamer, but this game is a good option to play to pass some time. The gameplay is simple yet fun. The music is also nice to listen to during the levels. Recommend this game for people that aren't hard-core mobile gamers but do want to pass some time!

Here from Reddit :) very good game, could be more enjoyable if it was a little bit harder and if there were some multipliers like in subway surfers. other than that great graphics, cars look fun and its overall a good game :)
Amazing game experience!! Stunning visuals.. However, it does have a few minor bugs. Overall had a great fun time playing.
Great way to quickly spend time, no ads that distract you from gameplay, easy to learn controls. Good game.
Love it. The game is diffrent the style has 80's vibe to it especially the music that goes along with the game.
It is a very fun and addictive game to play. Unlike other games this game is unique interms of its graphics, accuracy and extraordinary sounds..
Was at hospital and needed to wait 2 hour for my turn. Decided to try this game and it felt like I only waited 10 minutes. What a engaging game.
Addictively fun! The gameplay mechanics are smooth and intuitive. The game offers a nice blend of challenge and fun.
Casual time passer but add more cars with more color options, and add more vibrant colors to the map and add a catchy song
one of the best looking endless runner i have ever played. loved the gameplay and graphics. good job and best wishes to the team
I love the fact that this game is a challenge because when u get to a certain distance it's hard but not to hard to stay on the track
Only thing stopping this game to be my faveroite game is the not having a option to change music from your device like bomb squad and the game music is bit repeatative too 🥲
Surprisingly fun to play, the models are nice and it runs perfectly. Keep up the great work!
Simple mechanics, Polished controls and Minimalistic Environment. Good work
More levels in game but more graphic effect on eyes only one request for our game please low graphic setting to intruducing please
Wow, it looks amazing and smooth. I like the boost visual. Everything is polished.
Really amazing game,also can you please add horizontal mode? Pls I'm pretty sure many ppl will love to play that way
Cool game. Can't seem to get the "collect 60 gems streak" achievement though.
